"[5] **** THIS WILL BE RELATED TO INC 260304BC0161 WHERE THE OTHER INV'D CALLED IN AND GAVE A 1020 THAT PLACED IT IN ELE AREA / RP ADV'D HE ENTERED FWY AT MAST and INCIDENT OCC'D JWO MAST / RP ADV'D THAT THE VEHS DID PULL OVER AND BEFORE HE EXITED HIS VEH THE XRAY DRIVER OF THE OTHER VEH APPROACHED HIS VEH AND OPENED HIS CAR DOOR AND HIT RP'S FACE W/ HER HAND / SHE THEN DROVE AWAY"
